name: PuppyRoni
description:
PuppyRoni is a revolutionary meme coin designed to unite two universally loved entities: puppies and pizzas. At the heart of PuppyRoni lies a vibrant community, known as The Pack, where members can share their passion for both puppies and pizza. Through our platform, you can exchange your favourite grandmother's pizza recipes, showcase your adorable puppy photos, and find, and support like-minded people.
But PuppyRoni is more than just a meme coin.
Purpose of PuppyRoni Token ($RONI)
So, what's the deal with the PuppyRoni Token($RONI), you ask? Well, it's the backbone of our whole operation, fueling interactions, and supporting charities within the PuppyRoni ecosystem. Here's the deal on what $RONI brings to the table:
In essence, the PuppyRoni token  ($RONI) serves as a way in which individuals can share their passion for puppies and pizza, while also positively impacting the community and beyond. With 1% of transaction fees directed towards supporting dog shelters worldwide, and another 1% dedicated to supporting local pizzerias, we're not only doing good for ourselves but also for the things we love so much. Puppies, and Pizzas.
$RONI enables members of The Pack to engage in various activities, including sharing beloved pizza recipes passed down through generations and showcasing heart-melting photos of their furry companions. This brings a sense of camaraderie and connection among dog lovers and pizza enthusiasts alike.
Soon, PuppyRoni will establish partnerships with local pizzerias, hosting PuppyRoni Nights. During these events, puppy owners can bring their dogs to their local pizzeria for an enjoyable evening with their companions. Holders of $RONI tokens can participate in these nights and enjoy discounts on their favourite pizzas as long as they are members of The Pack. These benefits will only grow as we secure more partnerships and unveil even larger deals.
